server.name: Project Sirius
server.description: Modern open-source remake of Freelancer (2003) — LibreLancer engine + Discovery 4.86. To Freelancer what Black Mesa is to Half-Life.

channels.name: 📜-rules
channels.topic: Station regulations. Press the button below to launch.

channels.name: 📰-announcements
channels.topic: Official Project Sirius news and releases.

channels.name: 🛠-dev-blog
channels.topic: Engine progress: PBR, multiplayer, LibreLancer internals.

channels.name: 💬-general
channels.topic: Main hangout. Neutral territory — keep it civil.

channels.name: 🎲-off-topic
channels.topic: Anything not about the project. Bar talk.

channels.name: 🖼-media
channels.topic: Screenshots, art, clips. Freelancer nostalgia welcome.

channels.name: 🧭-sirius-chat
channels.topic: General discussion of the remake: roadmap, ideas, questions.

channels.name: 🧩-content-modding
channels.topic: Discovery 4.86 data, INI, UTF models, LancerEdit, modding tools.

channels.name: 🐛-bug-reports
channels.topic: One bug = one post. Attach logs and FLSpew output.

channels.name: 🧪-testing
channels.topic: Test builds coordination. Test Pilots wanted.

channels.name: 🎨-showcase
channels.topic: Renders, lookdev, WIP models and shaders.

welcome.dm_on_verify: Clearance granted, pilot. Welcome to the Sirius sector. o7

rules: **1. Respect every pilot.** No insults, harassment, hate speech or doxxing. We shoot ships, not people.
**2. English in public channels.** So everyone can follow along.
**3. No spam or self-promo.** No unsolicited invites, ads, crypto or 'free nitro'. Anti-spam is armed and will open fire.
**4. Keep content safe-for-work.** No NSFW/shock content, including avatars and nicknames.
**5. No piracy.** Don't share or request copyrighted game files. Bring your own legal copy of Freelancer/Discovery assets.
**6. Right channel, right topic.** Bugs → 🐛-bug-reports (one bug = one post, attach logs). Ideas → /suggest. Builds → 🧪-testing.
**7. Staff word is final.** Disagree? DM a 🛡️ Station Police officer — don't start a flame war.
**8. Follow Discord ToS and Community Guidelines.**
seed_messages.rules_footer: Press **🚀 Launch** below to verify and undock.
seed_messages.suggestions_intro: 💡 **How suggestions work:** run `/suggest` anywhere — your idea lands here as an embed. The community votes 👍/👎, staff marks the verdict. One idea per suggestion.
seed_messages.devblog_intro: 🛠 **Dev blog.** Engine milestones, PBR progress, multiplayer netcode, editor tooling. Replies open in threads — keep the main feed clean. o7
